scripts.db:debug: pnpm --filter @repo/database exec cross-env MIKRO_ORM_CLI_PREFER_TS=true mikro-orm debug --config src/mikro-orm.config.ts
scripts.db:create: pnpm --filter @repo/database exec cross-env MIKRO_ORM_CLI_PREFER_TS=true MIKRO_ORM_CLI_TS_LOADER=tsx mikro-orm migration:create --config src/mikro-orm.config.ts
scripts.db:up: pnpm --filter @repo/database exec cross-env MIKRO_ORM_CLI_PREFER_TS=true MIKRO_ORM_CLI_TS_LOADER=tsx mikro-orm migration:up --config src/mikro-orm.config.ts
scripts.db:down: pnpm --filter @repo/database exec cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--loader ts-node/esm --no-warnings" MIKRO_ORM_CLI_PREFER_TS=true mikro-orm migration:down --config src/mikro-orm.config.ts
scripts.db:fresh: pnpm --filter @repo/database exec cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--loader ts-node/esm --no-warnings" MIKRO_ORM_CLI_PREFER_TS=true mikro-orm migration:fresh --config src/mikro-orm.config.ts
scripts.db:sync: pnpm --filter @repo/database exec cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--loader ts-node/esm --no-warnings" MIKRO_ORM_CLI_PREFER_TS=true mikro-orm schema:update --run --config src/mikro-orm.config.ts
